product_name: The Lab Co. Cashmere & Wool Fabric Spray
notes: The Laundress already makes wool/cashmere fabric spray with cedar scent. Market is covered.

product_name: Zero Co Liquid Laundry Detergent Refillable
notes: Blueland dominates zero-waste laundry space with tablets and refills. Very crowded, no gap.
Eucalan and others already serve wool wash market. Woolmark certification not enough differentiation.
Tide powder already dominates this space. No meaningful differentiation possible.
US doesn't have clothesline culture (HOA restrictions, dryers ubiquitous). Product wouldn't translate.
Just another detergent - Tide/Persil/Arm&Hammer already cover this. No twist.
Seventh Generation, All Free Clear, and others already serve fragrance-free market well.
Bar Keeper's Friend and Bon Ami already dominate paste cleaner market.
Arm & Hammer Super Washing Soda is the established US product. Commodity.
Nikwax is already sold in US (REI, Amazon). UK brand, well-distributed.
Powder format declining in US market. Eucalyptus angle not strong enough alone.
Eucalan and others already have concentrated wool wash. No differentiation.
OxiClean dominates oxy booster market. Vanish is actually P&G brand available in some US stores.
OxiClean White Revive serves this exact need. No gap.

product_name: Sard Power Antibacterial Soaker with Eucalyptus
notes: Lysol Laundry Sanitizer already covers antibacterial laundry additive market.
Lysol Laundry Sanitizer already dominates antibacterial laundry additive space.

product_name: Bosisto's Pure Eucalyptus Oil Stain Pre-Treatment
notes: Pure essential oil is just commodity - anyone can buy eucalyptus oil. No brand moat.
US doesn't use clotheslines enough for premium clothespin market to exist.
Amazon has dozens of fabric shavers from $10-30. Saturated market.
Generic mesh laundry bags widely available. No meaningful differentiation for wool-specific.

product_name: Dry Flat Mesh Racks for Wool
notes: Sweater drying racks common on Amazon. No brand opportunity, commodity.
Too specialized, small market. Eucalan and Soak already serve wool enthusiasts.
